title: Guardian (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:SingingMountainGuardian-GH.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Guardian of [[Singing Mountain Clan]]]]
'''Guardian''' may refer to the following:

==[[In-universe]]==
===Creatures===
*[[Sentinel (creature)|Guardian of Forever]]
*[[Guardian Spirit]]
*[[Red Nebula temple guardian]]

===Droids===
*[[CG guardian droid]]
*[[Chirq Council Mechanized Guardian]]
*[[Guardian (Tendrando Arms)]]
*[[GV/3-series guardian droid]]
*[[Heavy Guardian]]
*[[HK Guardian Droid]]

===Individuals===
*The [[Guardian of Mount Tantiss]]
*The [[Guardian of the sun crystal]]
*[[Spectral guardian]]s
*[[The Barsen'thor]], a [[Jedi Consular]] who went by the codename "Guardian" as part of [[Aegis Squadron]]

===Organizations===
*[[Guardian flight]], a unit of the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]
*[[Guardian Squadron]], a unit of the [[Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic|New Republic Defense Force]]
*[[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]]
*The [[Kiffu Guardians]]
*The [[Guardians of the Breath]]
*[[Junction 5 Guardians]]

===Technology===
*''[[Galactic Guardian]]''
*[[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']], an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]]
*[[Guardian (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Guardian'']], an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]
*[[Guardian (Venator-class)/Legends|''Guardian'']], a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Guardian 334-class light cruiser|''Guardian 334''-class light cruisers]]
*[[Guardian 5e Personal Defense Speeder]]
*[[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']], formerly known as ''Guardian of the Republic''
*[[Guardian vessel]]s of the [[Kiffu Guardians]]
*[[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruisers]]
*[[Guardian-class patrol ship|''Guardian''-class patrol ships]]
*''[[Guardian Mantis]]''
*[[Ithorian guardian armor]]

===Other===
*[[Guardian of the People]]
*[[Guardian (rank)|Guardian]], an elite rank in the [[Guiteica Militia]]
**[[Major-Guardian]]
*[[Heart of the Guardian]]
